market: AI demand remains strong, but 2026 leadership is shifting toward companies that prove capex-to-cash conversion and disclose monetization quality, not just growth in infrastructure spend.
tech: Real value is concentrating in workflow-embedded AI, inference efficiency, and governance-ready deployments; model capability gains alone are increasingly commoditized without distribution and data moats.
risk: Main downside is capex outrunning monetization, compounded by export-control shifts, power/interconnect bottlenecks, and model-layer price compression; confidence is lower where source access was anti-bot restricted.
